title: 🏷️ PROGRAMME
data_structure:
\[
  {
    "name": "name",
    "mandatory": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "Top Gear"
  },
  {
    "name": "aired\_from\_year",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "2002"
  },
  {
    "name": "aired\_until\_year",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "2022"
  },
  {
    "name": "channel",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "BBC Two"
  },
  {
    "name": "total\_seasons",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "33"
  },
  {
    "name": "total\_episodes",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "240"
  },
  {
    "name": "regular\_episode\_running\_time",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "60"
  }
]
